description:
The post-onboarding home for patients. Shows mirrored case status from our DB, surfaces embedded MDI UI for clinical interactions, and respects the MFA gate on case detail.

**Scope**
- `src/app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx` — server component. Lists the user's cases from the local mirror (`cases` table). For each case: status, condition, last-update relative time, "new message" cue if applicable.
- `src/app/(app)/dashboard/cases/[caseId]/page.tsx` — case detail. Behind MFA gate (T-015 middleware). Embeds MDI's:
  - Intake questionnaire (for cases in `created` or `waiting` status that have unanswered questions).
  - Message thread.
  - File-request slots (if MDI requested a doc).
- Status banner: if `MDI_UNAVAILABLE` feature flag is on (T-064), surface a maintenance message.
- Plain-spoken voice per PRODUCT.md; no clinical-blue per RULES.md.

**Acceptance**
- A case in `assigned` status displays the embedded questionnaire; once submitted (via MDI's iframe), the next webhook moves status to `processing` and the questionnaire disappears.
- Hitting case detail without MFA redirects to enrollment, then back.
- No raw clinical content (questions, answers, messages) lives in our DB — verified via DB inspection.
title: Patient dashboard: case mirror + embedded MDI surfaces
